blended.narrative: Lake Louise is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,702 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
